---
title: "Surgical Aid Society"
---

## Surgical Aid Society

**Type:** organization

### About

The Royal Surgical Aid Society was founded in 1862 to provide the poor with artificial limbs, trusses, ear trumpets, leg irons and boots. With the institution of the NHS it began to run old people’s homes, and is now called AgeCare, see www.agecare.org.uk

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
